title: mohria marginalis
intro: Mohria marginalis, also known as the marginal maidenhair fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its numerous health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic compounds. Herbal preparations of Mohria marginalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to soothe digestive issues.
